page: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-88-lssd is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor. It features 88 dedicated vCPUs across 44 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system is configured with 352 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4 GB of memory per core. Storage is bundled directly with the instance, providing 16 local NVMe SSDs with a total capacity of 6432 GB, while no dedicated GPU hardware is present.

Benchmark results show strong multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and Geekbench multi-core scores ranking in the top 25%. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), enabling top-tier performance in image processing and small-model LLM inference prompt processing. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with cached small-block reads and uncached large-block read and write operations consistently placing in the top 25% of tested hardware.

The inclusion of high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage provides high qualitative cost efficiency for I/O-intensive operations by eliminating the need for external storage attachments. This resource profile is highly suited for large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, software compilation, and parallel data processing workloads.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-88-lssd is an x86_64 general-purpose server powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor. It features 88 dedicated vCPUs, 352 GB of RAM, and 16 bundled local NVMe SSDs totaling 6432 GB. The instance delivers strong multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth, ranking in the top 25% across multiple benchmarks. It also achieves top-tier results in image processing and small-model LLM prompt processing, aided by hardware-accelerated instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX. With its high-density local storage and robust database operation metrics, this server is highly efficient for large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, and parallel software compilation.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-88-lssd is an x86_64 server with 88 dedicated vCPUs, 352 GB RAM, and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-88-lssd features 88 vCPUs, 352 GB RAM, and 6432 GB NVMe SSD storage for high-performance database workloads.
tagline: An x86_64 server with 88 dedicated vCPUs, 352 GB RAM, and 6.4 TB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: 88 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8481C processors
352 GB of RAM providing 4 GB per core
6432 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD storage across 16 drives
Strong multi-core performance and top-tier image processing capabilities
Optimized for large-scale databases, web serving, and LLM inference
